## 📈 MSTR / Strategy

- 🏦 **Bitcoin holdings**: Strategy holds **843,738 BTC** — total assets above $54B, equity ~$36.7B
- 📉 **Price**: $165.40 (May 20) — down -31.9% from your avg cost of $243; -59.9% YoY, +6.5% this month
- 🔄 **Strategy shift**: Company breaks from its "never sell" Bitcoin stance — notable policy evolution
- 🎯 **Analyst consensus**: **Strong Buy** — 22 Buy / 1 Hold, avg 12-month target **$358** (high: $705, low: $185)
- 💡 **Upside potential**: +116% from today's price to analyst avg target; some analysts see 140%+ upside

---

## ₿ Bitcoin

- 💰 **Price today**: ~**$77,854** (May 21, 2026), up +0.72% in 24h · Market cap: $1.56T
- 📅 **Monthly trend**: BTC hit $80,120 on May 15 → pulled back to ~$77K range this week
- 😰 **Macro headwinds**: Hot inflation data, U.S.-Iran tensions, ETF outflows, leveraged long liquidations
- 🌡️ **Fear & Greed Index**: **39 — Fear zone** (down sharply from 63 Greed just weeks ago)

```
Fear & Greed Weekly Trend (May 2026):
Early May  → 🟡 50  Neutral  (ended 108-day extreme-fear streak)
Mid May    → 🟢 63  Greed
May 20-21  → 🔴 39  Fear     ← current
```

- 📊 **Retail sentiment**: Weakening — rotation from BTC to high-yield bonds as Fed holds rates high

---

## 🤖 Tech & AI

- 🧠 **Anthropic / Claude**: Launched **Claude for Small Business** — prebuilt agents natively inside QuickBooks, PayPal, HubSpot, Canva, DocuSign & Google/Microsoft 365. KPMG (276,000 staff) and PwC signed major integration partnerships.
- 💸 **Anthropic valuation**: Seeking fresh funding at ~$950B; **quadrupled** enterprise market share vs. OpenAI since May 2025.
- ⚖️ **Legal battle**: Anthropic vs. U.S. Dept. of Defense in D.C. federal court — DOD seeks unrestricted model access; Anthropic drawing lines on autonomous weapons & mass surveillance use.
- 🚀 **IPO mega-wave**: OpenAI + SpaceX both filed confidential IPOs — OpenAI eyeing **$1T+ valuation**, SpaceX listing expected as early as next month.
- 🎮 **Nvidia Q1 earnings**: Beat analyst estimates after the bell May 20; AI chip demand continues to buoy tech sentiment.

---

## 🧬 Health & Science

- 🧠 **Alzheimer's nanotech**: Engineered nanoparticles reversed Alzheimer's symptoms in mice — cleared toxic amyloid proteins and repaired the blood-brain barrier. New enzyme IDOL also identified as major drug target.
- 🧓 **Anti-aging skin**: Drug ABT-263 dramatically improves wound healing in older skin; separate protein discovered that brakes chronic aging-related inflammation.
- 🔬 **Zombie cells**: Synthetic DNA "aptamers" at Mayo Clinic selectively tag senescent cells — breakthrough for precision aging therapies.
- 🍬 **Glycan Atlas**: Hidden "sugar code" on human cells surface discovered — could transform early disease detection via advanced imaging.
- 🏃 **Exercise & brain**: Brain cells stay active long after workouts to build endurance — exercise trains the brain as much as the body.

---

## 💹 Finance & Markets

- 📈 **May 20 close**: **Nasdaq +1.54%** · Dow +1.31% · S&P 500 +1.08% — tech and discretionary led gains
- 🟢 **Nvidia**: Q1 results beat estimates after hours; shares up; AI infrastructure spending confirmed resilient
- 🛢️ **Oil/Iran**: 3 supertankers cleared Strait of Hormuz; Trump signals Iran deal imminent → easing energy inflation fears
- 📋 **IPO pipeline**: OpenAI + SpaceX confidential filings — could be among the largest IPOs in U.S. history
- 📊 **May context**: Markets recovering from early-year trade-war volatility; tech and discretionary leading the rebound
